description_long: An older adult male is dressed in formal attire, featuring a classic suit with a bow tie and a pocket square. He stands with his arms crossed, exuding a confident and composed demeanor. His hair is short and neatly styled, and his facial expression is pleasant, with a slight smile. The suit is well-fitted, and he wears dress shoes that complement the formal look. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and his posture is upright and relaxed. The overall appearance suggests he is prepared for a formal or professional event in an urban setting.
description: An older man in a formal suit with a bow tie and pocket square stands upright with arms crossed, exuding confidence and composure.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the man's face, crossed arms, and full formal attire including bow tie and pocket square.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of his face, the arm crossing, and the fit of the suit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of his head, suit jacket, and straight posture.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of his face, crossed arms, and the suit's silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: formal business suit with bow tie and pocket square
